note: 4-step consumer funnel (accountType != Corporate on all steps). Payment Method Selected removed. Mobile web = platform=Web, device NOT desktop. 5d = 432000s window, 0d = 86400s window. Updated 2026-03-25.

insights.overall: 39.0% of mobile web consumer users who confirm a quote complete the transaction (5d). 0-day conversion is 29.7%. Desktop converts at 70.1% — a 31.1pp gap.
insights.us_problem: US: only 18.5% mobile web conversion (5d). 0-day is 13.6%. Worst major corridor. ACH delays destroy mobile experience.
insights.uk_strong: UK: 63.3% conversion (desktop: 80.8%). Gap is -17.5pp. Best mobile web region by volume. Open Banking + debit cards = faster flows.
insights.ngn_broken: Nigeria: 7.1% (5d), 6.7% (0d). Only 17 of 238 complete. Catastrophically broken.
insights.direct_debit_0d: Direct debit 0-day conversion: 6.5% vs full window 85.5%. This payment method simply cannot convert within a day — it takes 4-5 days for ACH/DD to settle.
insights.debit_best: Debit cards: 91.5% full conversion, 84.8% 0-day. Best payment method on mobile web. Instant authorization = instant completion.

payment_method_summary.note: Payment Method Selected removed from main funnel. Main drop-offs: Quote Confirmed → Txn Summary Confirmed, and Txn Created → Txn Completed.

plaid_funnel.note: Plaid = connecting US bank account via Bank Verification. Bank Transfer = ACH settlement (Transaction Created → Completed, typically 3-5 days).

plaid_connection.title: Plaid Connection (Bank Verification Started → Completed)
plaid_connection.description: User connects their bank account through Plaid OAuth flow
plaid_connection.key_finding: Web 58.1% vs iOS 64.2% vs Android 45.8%. Android loses 54% of users during Plaid bank connection — the OAuth redirect flow breaks on many Android browsers.

bank_transfer_completion.title: Bank Transfer Completion (Txn Created → Completed, 5-day window)
bank_transfer_completion.description: After transaction is created with bank_account payment method, does ACH settle within 5 days?
bank_transfer_completion.key_finding: Once the transaction is created, 88-92% complete within 5 days across all platforms. Web actually has the best rate (91.5%). The problem is getting TO transaction creation, not after.

issues.title: Quote Confirmed -> Payment Method Selection: 20.7pp gap
issues.description: 2,093 mobile web users/month confirm a quote but never select a payment method. Root cause: recipient creation (38.6% vs 56.5% desktop) and KYC prompts between these steps.
issues.recommendation: Break recipient creation into mobile-optimized steps. Pre-fill where possible. Add progress indicator.

issues.title: Txn Summary -> Transaction Created: 12.3pp gap
issues.description: 552 users confirm summary but transaction never creates. 3DS redirect failures, open banking redirect issues, and session timeouts on mobile.
issues.recommendation: Investigate 3DS redirect failures on Safari/Chrome. Add mobile-specific error handling for redirect flows.

issues.title: Recipient Creation: 17.9pp gap (38.6% vs 56.5%)
issues.description: 2,229 users start creating a recipient but fail. Bank details forms with IBAN, routing numbers, country-specific formats are painful on mobile.
issues.recommendation: IBAN scanner, auto-detect routing format by country, break multi-field forms into single-input steps.

issues.title: Error Recovery: 12.5% vs 41.3% desktop (-28.8pp)
issues.description: When payment fails on mobile web, only 12.5% retry vs 41.3% on desktop. Error recovery CTA is below the fold.
issues.recommendation: Make error recovery CTA sticky at bottom. Show "Try Again" ABOVE error details.

issues.title: Biometric Verification (KYC): 15.2pp gap (63.1% vs 78.3%)
issues.description: 138 mobile web users start KYC but never submit. Veriff/Onfido document capture performs worse in mobile browsers.
issues.recommendation: Deep-link to native app for KYC. Use Veriff mobile SDK. Add "Continue on desktop" QR code option.

issues.title: Login Page Bounce: 14.8pp gap (47.5% vs 62.3%)
issues.description: 19,253 mobile users see login page but never attempt login. Over half bounce immediately.
issues.recommendation: Check mobile load time, autofill support, social login prominence. Consider passkeys/WebAuthn.

issues.title: Login Failure Rate: 30.3% vs 22.7% desktop (+7.6pp)
issues.description: 11,117 unique mobile users fail login/month. Mobile keyboards increase typo rates.
issues.recommendation: Password visibility toggle. Proper autocomplete attributes. Inline errors. Prominent "Forgot Password".

issues.title: 3DS Card Auth Failures on Mobile
issues.description: Card payment funnel: 26.1% MW vs 30.3% desktop. 3DS popup/redirect flows fail more on Safari and Chrome mobile.
issues.recommendation: Implement 3DS2 inline challenge instead of popup/redirect.

issues.title: US Market: Worst Mobile Web Conversion (24.8%)
issues.description: US converts at 24.8% on mobile web. Plaid bank linking adds friction. Complex recipient forms for intl transfers.
issues.impact: US is the largest sender market
issues.recommendation: Optimize Plaid for mobile browsers. Simplify US recipient forms.

issues.title: Quote Created -> Quote Confirmed: 8.9pp gap
issues.description: 2,439 users see a quote but dont confirm. Rate/fee comparison harder on small screens.
issues.impact: ~700 users with intent lost at quote stage
issues.recommendation: Card layout instead of table for quote comparison. Highlight cheapest/fastest. inputmode=decimal for amounts.

issues.title: Nigeria: 8.1% Mobile Web Conversion
issues.description: Only 9 transactions from 111 users. KYC + limited payment options = near-impossible mobile journey.

issues.title: Germany: 20.5% Mobile Web Conversion
issues.description: SEPA payment flows + stricter KYC create friction on mobile.

issues.title: Consent Gate: MW Tracking Blind Spot
issues.description: Web tracks ZERO events until cookie consent. Larger banner on mobile may cause higher reject rate, understating MW conversion.

issues.title: Card Auth Failed: Error Property Always Empty
issues.description: All 243 Card Authorisation Failed events on MW have empty error property. Cannot diagnose WHY card auth fails.
issues.recommendation: Fix error property population. Capture 3DS error code, issuer decline reason, timeout flag.

issues.title: Login Completed: Tracking Bug (119 completions from 17K attempts)
issues.description: Login Completed shows 119 on MW and 820 on desktop — clearly wrong. Event may be gated behind a redirect that drops it on mobile.
issues.recommendation: Audit Login Completed firing conditions. Check redirect/callback paths.

issues.title: Registration: 0% Completion (Both Platforms)
issues.description: 343 MW starts, 0 completions. Account Creation Complete event not firing. Only 2% reach Country Selection.
issues.recommendation: Verify event name in code. Check if renamed or using different completion event.

issues.title: 2,126 Users Stuck Between Quote and Payment
issues.description: 39.2% of users who confirmed a quote never reach payment method selection. Stuck in recipient creation, KYC, or navigation.

issues.title: Open Banking: Low Mobile Web Adoption
issues.description: Only 546 MW users start open banking vs 2,432 desktop. Users may not trust bank redirect on phone.

issues.title: EU Markets Underperform: Spain 22.7%, Netherlands 17.6%, Italy 21.1%
issues.description: EU sender countries consistently underperform on mobile web. SEPA/bank transfer flows may not be mobile-optimized.

recommendations.action: Fix Quote Confirmed -> Payment Method gap: mobile-optimize recipient creation + KYC
Sticky error recovery CTA on mobile error screens

recommendations.impact: +600 txns/mo at final step + card payments

recommendations.action: Fix login page mobile UX (autofill, passkeys, social login)
Fix tracking: Card Auth error prop, Login Completed, Registration completion
US market: Plaid mobile browser + simplified recipient forms

consumer_filter: Transaction Created: accountType is not Corporate
by_corridor_consumer_note: Consumer only (accountType != Corporate). By sendCurrency. Last 90 days.

debit.note: All who reach Txn Summary confirm with debit complete

payment_method_consumer_note: Consumer only. Txn Summary Confirmed → Txn Created by paymentMethod. 100% conversion means all who reach this step with a method selected complete.
